subdivisions.name: Peppertree Bay
subdivisions.tagline: Gulf-to-bay condominium living on south Siesta Key
subdivisions.description: Peppertree Bay is one of Siesta Key's most established condominium communities — four phases of low- and mid-rise residences and townhomes built in the early 1970s, spanning Midnight Pass Road from the Gulf of Mexico to Little Sarasota Bay. Owners enjoy deeded beach access on Siesta's famous quartz sand, along with a clubhouse, heated pools, tennis courts, and a fitness center inside a deed-restricted, association-managed setting. With a one-month minimum rental period, Peppertree Bay has long been prized both as a personal beach retreat and as an income-producing coastal asset.
